title: A Mom Spent $9,500 to Barbie-fy Her House in Scotland
script: Scotland went full Barbie! Nicole Watt, 27, from Carluke — a small town outside Glasgow — spent 6 months and about $9,500 turning her house into a Barbie Dreamhouse. For her 3 daughters. And for the local Gala Day celebration. We're talking: a pink slide, fake flamingos, palm trees, surfboards, and a disco ball. Outside. A house in Scotland. In June. Grandparents helped build most of it from wood, paint, and recycled materials. When Nicole posted it online, the house went viral. Strangers drove over from nearby towns. People lined up outside just to take photos. Not every neighbor loved it. But enough people did that the house basically became a free local attraction. Would you make the drive to see Nicole's house?
